\begin{frame}{{\tt donau} URI scheme}
{\url{https://lsd.gnunet.org/lsd0013/}}
\begin{itemize}
\item Donations to charities are often tax-deductable
\item Filing taxes with unstructured paper-receipts is messy
\item Taxes are often still filed on paper
\item[$\Rightarrow$] {\tt donau://} as a QR-code compatible
  proof of tax-deductable donations
\end{itemize}
\vfill
The URI contains the amount donated, the corresponding year, the
tax id number and the donation statement signature.
\end{frame}


\begin{frame}{Validation}
  \center
  \begin{tikzpicture}
    \node (image) at (0,0) {\includegraphics[width=0.1\textwidth]{stickman}};
    \node at (0,-1.8) {Donor};
    %arrow
    \draw [-latex] (1,-0.5) -- (7,-0.5);
    %QR-Code
    \draw (2.7,2.5) -- (3.4,0.9);
    \draw (4.9,2.5) -- (4.2,0.9);
    \node (image) at (3.8,2) {\includegraphics[width=0.05\textwidth]{gold_wax}};
    \node at (3.8,2) {\small{16}};
    \node at (3.8,2.5) {\tiny{7560001010000}};
    \node at (3.8,1.3) {\small{2024}};
    \node (image) at (3.8,0.2) {\includegraphics[width=0.1\textwidth]{qr-donau}};
    %server
    \node (image) at (8.5,0) {
    \includegraphics[width=0.1\textwidth]{stickman}};
    \node at (8.5,-1.8) {Tax Auditor};
  \end{tikzpicture}\vspace{0.4cm}
  \begin{itemize}
  \item The tax auditor is able to view the data and check the
    signature using the provided smartphone app.
  \end{itemize}
\end{frame}
%%%---------------------------------------


\begin{frame}{Discussions at IETF}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item uri-review: \url{https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/msg/uri-review/tSTAIyY9ZRCYmTt4LlYOwpnoIN4/}
      \begin{itemize}
        \item Good inputs from Ted Hardie
        \item All points made were addressed
        \item[$\Rightarrow$] IANA provisional registration exists
      \end{itemize}
    \item Draft includes OCR-friendly Base32-encoding inspired by
      Crockford but allowing {\bf u $\equiv$ {\bf v}} (also used by
      RFC 9498). 
    \item[$\Rightarrow$] Separtion was suggested, if anyone wants this?
  \end{itemize}
\end{frame}


\begin{frame}{Context}
  This is part of a larger protocol effort (\url{https://git-www.taler.net/}):
  \begin{itemize}
  \item Enable {\em anonymous} donations
  \item Ensure only approved charities can sign donation statements
  \item Make total amount of donations received per charity transparent to authorities
  \item Free software for citizens, charities, and tax authorities exists
  \end{itemize}
%  However, {\tt donau} URI scheme is deliberately independent of the
%  specific protocol used to obtain the proof of donation.

  This is part of an even larger protocol effort:
  \begin{itemize}
  \item Taler protocol enables {\em anonymous} digital cash
  \item Complex protocol with giving change, refunds, age-restrictions, etc.
  \item Already birthed RFC 8905.
  \end{itemize}  
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{Options for next steps}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Leave it at {\tt donau} draft
    \item Send {\tt donau} draft to ISE for informational track (separation of appendix?)
    \item Create payment BOF and charter WG for payment protocols\footnote{Note: No blockchains/DLTs involved here.}
  \end{itemize}
